response:
why can't people with braces manipulate gravity at will  
the human body is built with bones and muscles that work together to maintain balance and movement  
braces are used to correct misalignment and provide support during growth  
they do not have the ability to control gravity like a super hero  
the physics of gravity is based on mass and distance  
braces are just tools to help the body grow and develop properly  
the key is that the body has natural mechanisms to handle gravity  
people with braces do not have the power to manipulate it  
the concept of manipulating gravity is not possible with current scientific understanding  
the body's natural response to gravity is what keeps us grounded  
the final word of your response should be weakness
